claimText: NTU DFLL guidance says instructors may decide whether students may use generative AI; if permitted, students should clearly label AI-generated content and follow academic ethics.
normalizedValue: DFLL guidance makes AI use instructor-permission based with labeling and ethics duties

citation.citationTitle: 國立臺灣大學外國語文學系學生使用生成式AI 參考指引
